## Summary

Describe the change and user impact.

## Where logic lives

List exact files/modules where the behavior now lives, and why this placement matches architecture.

## Test evidence

List exact commands run and the result. Include unit/integration/e2e/contract coverage as applicable.

## Checklist

- [ ] No feature code added to generic folders (`misc`, broad `helpers`, broad `utils`)
- [ ] New endpoint/feature includes required tests
- [ ] No major logic added to files over 400 LOC without splitting
- [ ] Contracts/docs updated for changed feature modules
